The email address of the faculty member.

EmailBuilder - Class in com.rays.util
EmailBuilder is a utility class for creating HTML email messages for user registration, password recovery, and password change notifications.

emailFromAddress - Static variable in class com.rays.util.EmailUtility
Email login address
EmailMessage - Class in com.rays.util
EmailMessage is a simple JavaBean class representing an email message.
EmailMessage() - Constructor for class com.rays.util.EmailMessage
Default constructor
EmailMessage(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.rays.util.EmailMessage
Parameterized constructor to create an email message with recipient, subject, and message.
emailPassword - Static variable in class com.rays.util.EmailUtility
Email login password
EmailUtility - Class in com.rays.util
EmailUtility is a utility class for sending emails using SMTP.
EmailUtility() - Constructor for class com.rays.util.EmailUtility
 
encodeUrl(byte[]) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Encodes the given byte array to a Base64 URL-encoded string without padding.
encodeUrl(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Encodes the given string to a Base64 URL-encoded string without padding.
enrollmentNo - Variable in class com.rays.dto.StudentDTO
The unique enrollment number of the student.
enrollmentNo - Variable in class com.rays.form.StudentForm

The JPA EntityManager used for all database interactions.

The date on which the exam is scheduled.

examTime - Variable in class com.rays.dto.TimetableDTO
The time at which the exam is scheduled.

extractField(String, String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the value of a specific field from a JSON string.
extractLoginId(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the login ID (subject claim) from the given JWT token.
extractRole(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the role from the given JWT token.
extractUserId(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the user ID from the given JWT token.
